children.text: conduct any test or experiment involving the use of any chemical or biological agent on a civilian population; or
use human subjects for the testing of chemical or biological agents.

children.heading: Construction
children.label: b Construction
children.text: Nothing in subsection (a) may be construed to prohibit actions carried out for purposes not prohibited by this chapter (as defined in ).section 6701(8) of this title
death, disease, or other biological malfunction in a human, an animal, a plant, or another living organism;
deterioration of food, water, equipment, supplies, or materials of any kind; or
